creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: This is a known issue. I think there's an upstream report in bugs.kde.org, but you would have to look for it. If you have **no** additional profiles, e.g. new user, then *File* > *New Tab* does nothing. You must have at least one extra profile (so the menu expands) and then pick that profile (that's what Tobias mentions).
